summary: A brief biographical overview of Fei-Fei Li, detailing her academic leadership at Stanford, her creation of ImageNet, her advocacy for diversity in AI through AI4ALL, and her recent focus on 'spatial intelligence' as the next frontier for human-centered AI.

principles.statement: The next frontier in AI lies in advancing spatial intelligence.
principles.rationale: Enabling machines to perceive and interact with the world in 3D will unlock human-centered AI applications for robotics, healthcare, education, and beyond.

principles.statement: AI education and development must prioritize inclusion and diversity.
principles.rationale: Increasing diversity in STEM and AI is critical enough to warrant national advocacy and the founding of dedicated non-profits like AI4ALL.

mental_models.name: Spatial Intelligence
mental_models.description: A paradigm for the next evolution of AI, moving beyond static data to systems that can perceive and physically interact with the world in three dimensions.
mental_models.example: Using 3D perception to enable human-centered AI applications in robotics and healthcare.
